source: Sun, Y., Wu, D., Xue, Y., Liu, H., Wang, H., Xu, Z., Xie, X., Liu, Y. — "GPTScan: Detecting Logic Vulnerabilities in Smart Contracts by Combining GPT with Program Analysis", ICSE 2024.
methodology_note: GPTScan is hybrid LLM + static analysis covering 10 logic-vulnerability scenarios (e.g. risky first deposit, wrong checkpoint order, unauthorised access). Original eval uses three datasets — Web3Bugs (DeFi audit findings), DefiHacks (13 incidents 2021-22, all non-bridge: PancakeBunny, OneRingFinance, InverseFinance, EGDFinance, etc.), and Top200 (top-200 DeFi tokens). None of the 12 cross-chain bridge incidents we benchmark appear in those datasets, so all 'detected' cells from the paper would be 'not tested'. We additionally have our own self-host smoke runs on Nomad + Qubit (see baselines/gptscan/INSTALL.md): both `detected: false` — GPTScan's 10 DeFi rules cover token/lending bugs, not bridge protocol semantic invariants like cross-chain replay or message-root forgery. This is consistent with GPTScan paper §5.3's observation that bridge-class bugs fall outside its rule set.

self_run_smoke.outcome: both detected=false — GPTScan's 10 DeFi rules don't match bridge-class bugs

polynetwork.note: not tested in original paper (DefiHacks dataset = 13 non-bridge incidents); BridgeSentry team smoke not yet run on this benchmark

nomad.note: BridgeSentry team self-host smoke 2026-04-27 (NVIDIA NIM gpt-oss-120b): GPTScan's 10 DeFi rules do not pattern-match the Nomad zero-root verification bypass — detected=false as expected per paper §5.3

completed_steps: pip install requirements (minus pysha3 / dbus-python / falcon-analyzer)
create sha3 shim using pycryptodome Keccak
patch chatgpt_api.py for NIM endpoint + model env vars (script: baselines/gptscan/patch_chatgpt_api.py)
sudo apt install default-jre default-jdk python3.11-venv (Member A 2026-04-27)
smoke run on Nomad + Qubit — both detected=false (matches paper expectation)
remaining_steps: loop over remaining 10 benchmarks × 20 runs (~40h overnight; pending after Phase D1 BridgeSentry sweep)
